subject: Fwd: From Msg Sheet

From: "lauren" <lkwintner@nysgmail.com>
Subject: From Msg Sheet
Date: Tue, 27 Nov 2007 22:07:50 GMT
To: dkiesq@aol.com

From: David Grosoff Taken by: LAUREN on 11/27/2007
Phone# 415 846-3210

He needs clarification as to his position with COUQ.  If he is till officially engaged as a consultant , he needs to know what he should expect in way of sums because he files taxes yearly.  Please advise.

** End of Message
